_comment: Pin-of-record for the Infisical CLI (CELE-t224 encrypted secrets manager). Runtime artifact = the official release tarball at the pinned `version`; provisioning downloads it, verifies the archive sha256 against this pin (checksums come from the release's own checksums.txt), extracts the `infisical` binary, and caches it under ~/.cache/celeborn/infisical/<version>/. NEVER 'latest' at runtime — bump this pin only deliberately, re-copying the sha256 lines from the new release's checksums.txt.
